final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] q);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[0], ~q[1]};
        end
    end

endmodule
